description: The internal role hide-list ("disallowed"). One row = this role never sees this catalog field in Smart Views. Granularity is role -> field (global; a sensitive field is sensitive in any grain). Read ONLY by the internal Smart Views resolver; NEVER by the partner API. Business rows ship via db-seeds (operator-run), not fixtures.

fields.label: Role
fields.description: The role that is denied this field.

fields.label: Field
fields.description: The catalog field this role never sees in Smart Views.

name: CRM Lead Field Restriction
